top_signals.title: A Little-Known Indian Stock’s 530% Rally Shows Hidden AI Winners
top_signals.summary: The overarching narrative is that Indian equity markets missed out on the global artificial intelligence boom. But a look under the hood reveals a slew of smaller firms winning from trillions of dollars being spent on AI capacity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Slide as Cracks Emerge in World-Beating Rally
top_signals.summary: South Korea’s $4.9 trillion stock market is starting to flash signs of strain after a world-beating rally.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: 'Dr. Doom'-backed Atlas Capital CEO says bitcoin could crash 70% before reaching $500,000
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
